Definition.Description:
A medium fire rate, low damage turret that fires hydrogen-based projectiles. Uses CLG Autocannon Magazines
Maximum Range: 1000m

A huge twin-barrel turret capable of doing heavy damage against armored targets. Uses 305mm Shells
Maximum Range: 3500m

A large single-barrel turret capable of doing heavy damage against armored targets. Uses 305mm Shells
Maximum Range: 3500m

A small single-barrel turret capable of doing medium damage against armored targets. Uses 155mm Shells
Maximum Range: 2000m

A small single-barrel turret capable of doing medium damage against armored targets. Uses 155mm Shells
Maximum Range: 2000m

A small gun capable of doing medium damage against armored targets. Uses 155mm Shells
Range: 2000m

A large gun capable of doing heavy damage against armored targets. Uses 305mm Shells
Range: 3500m

Uses an electrically-powered piston to fire chunks of gravel with compressed air. Low damage, high fire rate. Good for short-range defense.
Maximum Range: 800m

Uses an electrically-powered piston to fire chunks of gravel with compressed air. Low damage, high fire rate. Good for short-range defense.
Maximum Range: 800m

Uses compressed air to fire a large stone. Long-range, decent damage, low fire rate.
Maximum Range: 1200m
